validators.seed_layer_note: Seed query layer remains A-F only because G-W derived enriched artifacts are still absent; this recheck intentionally did not rebuild derived artifacts.

findings: Operator fix is reflected in raw placement: G/H, H/I, and G/I no longer share 100% overlap for book_id, title, or filename sets.
No full-overlap pair remains anywhere in the computed G-W matrix for book_ids, titles, or filenames.
S6D rebuild stays discovery-driven and now detects A-W based on present artifacts, without hardcoding G-W as a permanent universe.
Downstream guardrails remain intact: candidate_only=PASS, promotion_allowed=PASS, must_fix_count=0.
Reusable seed query layer still exposes A-F only because the derived enriched layer for G-W was intentionally not built in this task.
warnings: G-W derived normalized/enriched artifacts remain absent by design for this task.
G-W source PDF directories remain absent.
S6F drift validator still reports PASS_WITH_WARNINGS due historical legacy references, but must_fix_count remains 0.
next_recommended_task: Plan derived build readiness for G-W, then run normalized/enriched build plus focused tagging QA while preserving discovery-driven selection and candidate-only boundaries.
